description: Page of documents to record a quanta of collected data

filled.description: Mapping each of the keys of externally-stored data to an array containing the boolean False, indicating that the data has not been loaded, or to foreign keys (moved here from 'data' when the data was loaded)

timestamps.description: The timestamps of the individual measurement data

time.description: Array of Event times. This maybe different than the timestamps on each of the data entries
time.title: Time

descriptor.description: The UID of the EventDescriptor to which all of the Events in this page belong
descriptor.title: Descriptor

seq_num.description: Array of sequence numbers to identify the location of each Event in the Event stream
seq_num.title: Seq Num

uid.description: Array of globally unique identifiers for each Event
uid.title: Uid

title: EventPage
